summary: A thorough professional code review of the GeoResilience Hub website, rating 10 categories from architecture to accessibility. Identifies 5 bugs (broken mobile menu, inline style abuse, inconsistent footer links, orphaned testimonials page, CSS class collision), 7 improvements (meta descriptions, favicon, gitignore, CDN pinning, scroll animations, form endpoint, counter refactor), and provides a prioritized action item table. Overall rating: 7.5/10 — strong foundation needing mobile menu fix and polish before deployment.
